title: Women of All Nations
writer: Maxwell Anderson, Barry Conners, Laurence Stallings
actors: Victor McLaglen, Edmund Lowe, Greta Nissen
plot: Marines Flagg and Quirt fought together in WWI and Panama. After some time in New York they go to Sweden and compete for the love of Else. Next they go to Nicaragua and help earthquake victims; then they go to Egypt, where Else is...
